name: Mexican Beef and Mushroom Stew
recipeIngredient: 12 ounce jar mild picante sauce, (1 1/2 cups)
1 cup shredded taco seasoned cheese, OR cheddar cheese -- (4 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, brown the round steak with onions and garlic in butter.
2. Stir in water, salt, chili powder, mushrooms, and picante sauce.
3. Simmer uncovered over Medium-Low heat for 1 1/2-2 hours or until meat is tender.
4. Serve over rice. Top with sour cream and cheese.
Serves 6.
Three (4.5 oz) jars whole mushrooms may be substituted for the two (6 oz.) jars.
